announcer.description: Original fictional football broadcaster for the low-poly prototype. Warm, authoritative, modern, and energetic without imitating a named person.
announcer.voiceDirection: Clear modern football broadcast delivery, controlled energy, warm authority, able to rise for big plays without shouting every line.

scripts.caption: I'm Grant Mercer. Welcome to Football JS. The lights are up, and the opening possession is next.
scripts.script: I'm Grant Mercer. Welcome to Football JS. The lights are up, and the opening possession is next.

scripts.caption: I'm Grant Mercer, here with you for Football JS. The offense is moments from the first snap.
scripts.script: I'm Grant Mercer, here with you for Football JS. The offense is moments from the first snap.

scripts.caption: I'm Grant Mercer. The stadium is ready, the teams are set, and Football JS is underway soon.
scripts.script: I'm Grant Mercer. The stadium is ready, the teams are set, and Football JS is underway soon.

scripts.caption: Both teams are finishing their warmups, and we're getting closer to kickoff.
scripts.script: Both teams are finishing their warmups, and we're getting closer to kickoff.

scripts.caption: The players are on the field, making their final preparations.
scripts.script: The players are on the field, making their final preparations.

scripts.caption: The matchup is set. The opening possession should tell us plenty.
scripts.script: The matchup is set. The opening possession should tell us plenty.

scripts.caption: Two different styles meet here, and clean execution early could tilt this fast.
scripts.script: Two different styles meet here, and clean execution early could tilt this fast.

scripts.caption: Clear conditions over the stadium. The offense can use the full play sheet from the start.
scripts.script: Clear conditions over the stadium. The offense can use the full play sheet from the start.

scripts.caption: A clean clear-weather setup today. No excuses on the opening drive.
scripts.script: A clean clear-weather setup today. No excuses on the opening drive.

scripts.caption: A heavy overcast sky sits over the field. Visibility is steady, but the air feels tight.
scripts.script: A heavy overcast sky sits over the field. Visibility is steady, but the air feels tight.

scripts.caption: Cloud cover from end zone to end zone. This should be a clean, controlled start.
scripts.script: Cloud cover from end zone to end zone. This should be a clean, controlled start.

scripts.caption: Light rain in the air. Ball security and short throws matter right away.
scripts.script: Light rain in the air. Ball security and short throws matter right away.

scripts.caption: A slick football night is forming. The first clean handle will be important.
scripts.script: A slick football night is forming. The first clean handle will be important.

scripts.caption: Snow is drifting through the lights. Footing and patience take on extra value.
scripts.script: Snow is drifting through the lights. Footing and patience take on extra value.

scripts.caption: Cold snow around the field. The team that stays balanced may settle in fastest.
scripts.script: Cold snow around the field. The team that stays balanced may settle in fastest.

scripts.caption: A firm wind is moving across the field. Timing and trajectory get tested early.
scripts.script: A firm wind is moving across the field. Timing and trajectory get tested early.

scripts.caption: Wind is part of the pregame picture. The offense will want quick, decisive snaps.
scripts.script: Wind is part of the pregame picture. The offense will want quick, decisive snaps.

scripts.caption: Drew Barton, number 6, leads this offense with the first snap coming.
scripts.script: Drew Barton, number 6, leads this offense with the first snap coming.

scripts.caption: Keep an eye on Drew Barton, number 6. The read comes fast in this system.
scripts.script: Keep an eye on Drew Barton, number 6. The read comes fast in this system.

scripts.caption: Drew Barton, number 6, starts under center with a chance to set the tone.
scripts.script: Drew Barton, number 6, starts under center with a chance to set the tone.

scripts.caption: Reid Harper, number 8, leads this offense with the first snap coming.
scripts.script: Reid Harper, number 8, leads this offense with the first snap coming.

scripts.caption: Keep an eye on Reid Harper, number 8. The read comes fast in this system.
scripts.script: Keep an eye on Reid Harper, number 8. The read comes fast in this system.

scripts.caption: Reid Harper, number 8, starts under center with a chance to set the tone.
scripts.script: Reid Harper, number 8, starts under center with a chance to set the tone.

scripts.caption: Jalen Carter, number 12, leads this offense with the first snap coming.
scripts.script: Jalen Carter, number 12, leads this offense with the first snap coming.

scripts.caption: Keep an eye on Jalen Carter, number 12. The read comes fast in this system.
scripts.script: Keep an eye on Jalen Carter, number 12. The read comes fast in this system.

scripts.caption: Jalen Carter, number 12, starts under center with a chance to set the tone.

scripts.caption: Cyrus Ward, number 14, leads this offense with the first snap coming.
scripts.script: Cyrus Ward, number 14, leads this offense with the first snap coming.

scripts.caption: Keep an eye on Cyrus Ward, number 14. The read comes fast in this system.
scripts.script: Keep an eye on Cyrus Ward, number 14. The read comes fast in this system.

scripts.caption: Cyrus Ward, number 14, starts under center with a chance to set the tone.
scripts.script: Cyrus Ward, number 14, starts under center with a chance to set the tone.

scripts.caption: This quarterback gives the offense several different ways to attack.
scripts.script: This quarterback gives the offense several different ways to attack.

scripts.caption: The offense can lean on his arm, his movement, or a quick rhythm game.
scripts.script: The offense can lean on his arm, his movement, or a quick rhythm game.

scripts.caption: He'll need to read the defense and keep this offense on schedule.
scripts.script: He'll need to read the defense and keep this offense on schedule.

scripts.caption: His best work comes from timing, patience, and putting the ball in the right place.
scripts.script: His best work comes from timing, patience, and putting the ball in the right place.

scripts.caption: Keeping the quarterback contained will be one of the defense's biggest challenges.
scripts.script: Keeping the quarterback contained will be one of the defense's biggest challenges.

scripts.caption: When the play breaks down, he can still create something on his own.
scripts.script: When the play breaks down, he can still create something on his own.

scripts.caption: This quarterback has the arm to challenge every part of the field.
scripts.script: This quarterback has the arm to challenge every part of the field.

scripts.caption: That throwing arm can stretch the defense if the pocket holds up.
scripts.script: That throwing arm can stretch the defense if the pocket holds up.

scripts.caption: He gives this offense several ways to win, and they'll need that balance today.
scripts.script: He gives this offense several ways to win, and they'll need that balance today.

scripts.caption: Arm talent, accuracy, and movement all show up when this offense is in rhythm.
scripts.script: Arm talent, accuracy, and movement all show up when this offense is in rhythm.

scripts.caption: He does his best work reading the field and putting the football in the right place.
scripts.script: He does his best work reading the field and putting the football in the right place.

scripts.caption: Accuracy and timing are the calling cards. The ball needs to come out on schedule.
scripts.script: Accuracy and timing are the calling cards. The ball needs to come out on schedule.

scripts.caption: He can hurt a defense with his arm or his legs, so containment matters from the first snap.
scripts.script: He can hurt a defense with his arm or his legs, so containment matters from the first snap.

scripts.caption: Broken plays are where a scrambler can turn trouble into yardage.
scripts.script: Broken plays are where a scrambler can turn trouble into yardage.

scripts.caption: He has the arm to stretch the field, and the defense has to respect the deep ball.
scripts.script: He has the arm to stretch the field, and the defense has to respect the deep ball.

scripts.caption: Expect this offense to test space downfield when protection gives him time.
scripts.script: Expect this offense to test space downfield when protection gives him time.

scripts.caption: The captains are at midfield for the coin toss.
scripts.script: The captains are at midfield for the coin toss.

scripts.caption: We're ready for the toss at midfield.
scripts.script: We're ready for the toss at midfield.

scripts.caption: Metro Meteors have won the toss and will receive.
scripts.script: Metro Meteors have won the toss and will receive.

scripts.caption: Metro Meteors will kick to begin the game.
scripts.script: Metro Meteors will kick to begin the game.

scripts.caption: Lakefront Lights will kick to begin the game.
scripts.script: Lakefront Lights will kick to begin the game.

scripts.script: Ironwood Owls will kick to begin the game.

scripts.script: Desert Ridge Scorpions have won the toss and will receive.

scripts.script: Desert Ridge Scorpions will kick to begin the game.

scripts.caption: The toss goes to the receiving team.
scripts.script: The toss goes to the receiving team.

scripts.caption: The kicking team will open this one by sending it away.
scripts.script: The kicking team will open this one by sending it away.

scripts.caption: The teams are getting set for the opening kickoff.
scripts.script: The teams are getting set for the opening kickoff.

scripts.caption: We're just about ready to kick this one off.
scripts.script: We're just about ready to kick this one off.

scripts.caption: The ball is on the tee, and the opening kick is moments away.
scripts.script: The ball is on the tee, and the opening kick is moments away.

scripts.caption: The kick is away.
scripts.script: The kick is away.

scripts.caption: And we're underway.
scripts.script: And we're underway.

scripts.caption: This one carries into the end zone for a touchback.
scripts.script: This one carries into the end zone for a touchback.

scripts.caption: No return here. The offense will start after the touchback.
scripts.script: No return here. The offense will start after the touchback.

scripts.caption: The return sets the offense up with decent field position.
scripts.script: The return sets the offense up with decent field position.

scripts.caption: The return is handled cleanly, and the offense is coming out.
scripts.script: The return is handled cleanly, and the offense is coming out.

scripts.caption: A shorter kick gives the return team a chance to set up quickly.
scripts.script: A shorter kick gives the return team a chance to set up quickly.

scripts.caption: The kick comes down short, and the return coverage has to close fast.
scripts.script: The kick comes down short, and the return coverage has to close fast.

scripts.caption: A deep kick drives the returner back toward the goal line.
scripts.script: A deep kick drives the returner back toward the goal line.

scripts.caption: That kick has plenty of distance, and the coverage is moving downhill.
scripts.script: That kick has plenty of distance, and the coverage is moving downhill.
